name: elemento-website
description: Modern website for Elemento - Modular Cloud Solutions

scripts.i18n:translate: test -x .venv-i18n/bin/python && .venv-i18n/bin/python scripts/translate-strings.py it || (python3 -m venv .venv-i18n && .venv-i18n/bin/pip install -q deep-translator && .venv-i18n/bin/python scripts/translate-strings.py it)
scripts.i18n:translate:fr: test -x .venv-i18n/bin/python && .venv-i18n/bin/python scripts/translate-strings.py fr || (python3 -m venv .venv-i18n && .venv-i18n/bin/pip install -q deep-translator && .venv-i18n/bin/python scripts/translate-strings.py fr)
scripts.i18n:localize:fr: npm run i18n:translate:fr && node scripts/apply-fr-wording-fixes.mjs && npm run i18n:import:fr
scripts.i18n:localize: npm run i18n:extract && npm run i18n:translate && npm run i18n:import
scripts.build: astro build && npm run minify-css && npm run minify-js
scripts.postbuild: node scripts/fix-locale-index.mjs && node scripts/clean-dist-legacy.mjs && node scripts/generate-sitemap.mjs
scripts.minify-css: for file in css/*.css; do case "$file" in *.min.css) continue ;; esac; if [ -f "$file" ]; then cleancss -o "${file%.css}.min.css" "$file"; fi; done && for file in css/gradient-blobs/*.css; do case "$file" in *.min.css) continue ;; esac; if [ -f "$file" ]; then cleancss -o "${file%.css}.min.css" "$file"; fi; done
scripts.minify-js: for file in js/*.js; do case "$file" in *.min.js) continue ;; esac; if [ -f "$file" ]; then terser "$file" -o "${file%.js}.min.js" --compress --mangle; fi; done

author: Elemento srl
